documents.title: Final Freeze Note
documents.description: Plain-language final lock document. What the corporate extension is, what it is not, geometry roles, and the operator's claim discipline.

documents.title: Phase 19 Decision Note
documents.description: Integrated two-label decision across the five Phase-19 hardening tracks. Honest 'signal survives but is weaker than simple baselines' framing lives here.

documents.title: Phase 18 Full-Population Results
documents.description: The locked Phase-18 result on the full eligible-universe panel. Pooled and per-year metrics; the comparison chain across Phases 15–18.

documents.title: Baseline Comparison
documents.description: A/G composite vs single-primitive baselines vs Altman-style proxy. The reviewer-defense write-up of the 'single primitives slightly beat the composite' finding.

documents.title: Sector-Stratified Analysis
documents.description: Per-SIC-division metrics with explicit reliability flags. Manufacturing-3 (durables / electronics) is the weak cell.

documents.title: Calibration Policy
documents.description: Predeclared monitoring-band policy on structural distress. Includes the documented top-1% tail dropoff.

documents.title: Divergence-Anchor Study
documents.description: Internal future-state divergence-anchor study; first internal evidence supporting canonical R for its intended divergence regime.

documents.title: Anchor Refresh Note
documents.description: Bounded EDGAR FTS refresh from 2026-01-01 onward; 6 new high-confidence Item-1.03 anchors; descriptive 22-row out-of-time check.

documents.title: Artifact Index
documents.description: Single navigable index of every artifact (CURRENT vs HISTORICAL vs SUPERSEDED). Lives in the project repository as CORPORATE_ARTIFACT_INDEX.md; not duplicated on this public site.

documents.title: Evidence Packet Manifest
documents.description: Compact send-back file list for reviewers. Lives in the project repository as CORPORATE_EVIDENCE_PACKET_MANIFEST.md.

documents.title: Reproducibility Runbook
documents.description: Step-by-step instructions to re-derive locked Phase-18 / Phase-19 outputs from raw SEC data. Lives in the project repository as CORPORATE_REPRODUCIBILITY_RUNBOOK.md.

not_included_in_public_docs: raw SEC submissions/CIK*.json (gigabytes; reproducible from public SEC URLs)
raw SEC companyfacts/CIK*.json (gigabytes; reproducible from public SEC URLs)
phase18_full_population_panel.csv (~30 MB; per-CIK data; could be misread as public ranking)
any company ranking / top-N list / watchlist
